mapper.select: SELECT a.appointment_date AS date, COUNT(*) AS count, COALESCE(SUM(a.total_amount), 0) AS total_amount FROM appointment a WHERE a.appointment_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY a.appointment_date ORDER BY a.appointment_date ASC

SELECT DATE(p.payment_time) AS date, SUM(CASE WHEN p.payment_status = 1 THEN p.payment_amount ELSE 0 END) AS success_amount, SUM(CASE WHEN p.payment_status = 3 THEN p.payment_amount ELSE 0 END) AS refund_amount, SUM(CASE WHEN p.payment_status = 1 THEN p.payment_amount ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN p.payment_status = 3 THEN p.payment_amount ELSE 0 END) AS net_revenue FROM payment p WHERE DATE(p.payment_time) >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE(p.payment_time) ORDER BY date ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE user_type = #{userType} AND status = 1

SELECT CAST(r.overall_rating AS UNSIGNED) AS rating, COUNT(*) AS count FROM review r LEFT JOIN appointment a ON r.appointment_id = a.appointment_id
AND DATE(a.appointment_date) >= #{startDate} AND DATE(a.appointment_date) <= #{endDate} AND r.overall_rating IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY CAST(r.overall_rating AS UNSIGNED) ORDER BY rating DESC

SELECT CAST(r.overall_rating AS UNSIGNED) AS rating, COUNT(*) AS count FROM payment p INNER JOIN appointment a ON p.appointment_id = a.appointment_id INNER JOIN review r ON a.appointment_id = r.appointment_id
AND p.payment_status = 1 AND DATE(p.payment_time) >= #{startDate} AND DATE(p.payment_time) <= #{endDate} AND r.overall_rating IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY CAST(r.overall_rating AS UNSIGNED) ORDER BY rating DESC
